title: cirsium occidentale subsp. euoccidentale
intro: Cirsium occidentale subsp. euoccidentale, also known as the western thistle or woolly thistle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the western United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of saponins and flavonoids. The medicinal properties of Cirsium occidentale subsp. euoccidentale have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
